underlying_goal: Review a PR's bugbot findings, fix failing tests, and push fixes; then review another PR
friction_detail: Initial fix (lifecycle_status_pruned? → pruned?) only resolved part of the failures; multiple iterative rounds were needed to fix test setup issues with lazy evaluation and factory state ordering.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to review bugbot findings on a PR, fix failing tests, commit/push fixes, and review another PR — all tasks were completed successfully with thorough debugging of enum method naming and test setup issues.
